messages.subject: [RsR] robust ridge regression
messages.body_plain:
Hello,

Has there been a package contributed to CRAN that implements Robust
Ridge regression (e.g. the method proposed by Maronna in 2011) or other
methods designed specifically for multicollinear data?  My application
(landscape genetics; more specifically regression among distance
matrices) would have a small sample size as well.

Thanks,

Heather

 

Aquatic Biologist

Population Ecology Division 

Fisheries and Oceans Canada

1 Challenger Drive

Dartmouth, NS

B2Y 4A2

(902) 426-5836

 


	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
